/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/test/test_flow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/src/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/src/conversation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/src/llm/tool_exec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/src/llm/persistent_shell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/src/llm/provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/src/ui/markdown.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_llmchat.dir/src/ui/text_util.cpp.o -o test_llmchat  -lcurl -lpthread
